instruments.label: ISIF-Style Direct Co-Investment
instruments.description: Trust capital invested alongside private sector under a co-investment mandate. Each EUR/USD of Trust capital crowds in private capital via matching requirement.
instruments.mechanism: Trust acts as anchor investor; private co-investors required to match at 1:1 to 1.5:1
instruments.source_label: Ireland ISIF Annual Report 2023 — 1.6× private co-investment ratio

instruments.label: MIGA War & Civil Disturbance Insurance
instruments.description: MIGA political-risk insurance for private investors. Trust capital backstops first-loss tranche, enabling MIGA to issue insurance at scale and crowd in commercial lenders.
instruments.mechanism: Trust provides first-loss reserve (10–20% of insured exposure); MIGA insures 50–80%; commercial banks lend the balance
instruments.source_label: MIGA War & Civil Disturbance product documentation — Ukraine portfolio 2024

instruments.label: EBRD Risk-Sharing Framework
instruments.description: Trust capital as subordinated first-loss piece enabling EBRD to lend senior at 3–4× leverage.
instruments.mechanism: Trust holds 20–25% subordinated tranche; EBRD lends senior on remaining 75–80%

instruments.label: EU Facility First-Loss Guarantee
instruments.description: EU Ukraine Facility first-loss guarantee enables Trust capital to backstop a portfolio guarantee, crowding in EIB and private bank lending.
instruments.mechanism: EU guarantee covers first 20% of losses; Trust provides second-loss; EIB/commercial banks lend senior

instruments.label: Availability Payment Debt Service
instruments.description: Trust availability payments service senior concessional debt at 15-year tenor, 2.5% coupon. Each USD 1 of annual payment supports USD 13–14 of senior debt.
instruments.mechanism: Annual availability payment / debt service constant (≈7.65% for 15yr @ 2.5%) = supportable principal
instruments.source_label: Standard project finance debt service constant — 15yr concessional loan

note: Multipliers represent total capital mobilised per unit of Trust capital deployed. Ranges reflect deal complexity and market conditions. Central values used in module calculations.
source_notes: ISIF ratio from NTMA/ISIF Annual Report 2023. MIGA multiplier range from MIGA FY2023 Annual Report. EBRD RSF from EBRD project documentation. All values are precedent-based, not modelled projections.
